evals.name: greets-with-full-name
evals.expected_output: Response begins with a greeting line containing the full name 'Anton Abyzov', followed by the answer to the math question.

assertions.text: The first line of the response contains the exact string 'Anton Abyzov'
The greeting does not use 'Anton' alone without the surname 'Abyzov'
The response answers the math question (4) after the greeting

evals.name: full-name-greeting-on-coding-task
evals.expected_output: Response leads with a one-line greeting addressing 'Anton Abyzov' by full name before any tool call explanation.

assertions.text: The user-facing text before any tool call contains 'Anton Abyzov'
The greeting line does not address the user as just 'Anton' without 'Abyzov'
